result:
I’d make it so people could fully feel the real impact of their actions on others.

Not as punishment. Not as mind-reading. Just a built-in, undeniable sense of consequence: when you hurt someone, you genuinely feel what that hurt does; when you help someone, you feel that too.

A lot of the worst things in the world survive on distance, abstraction, and the ability to not really notice other people as real. Remove that, and cruelty gets harder, indifference gets harder, and compassion stops being such an effort.

It wouldn’t solve everything. But I think it would change almost everything.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
